LanguageData.Diary_Royalty.personaNarrativeFormat: {0}'s exact persona-weapon bond with {1} remains part of this moment.
LanguageData.Diary_Royalty.titleNarrativeFormat: {0} currently holds the exact royal title {1} of {2}.
LanguageData.Diary_Royalty.titleWithDutiesNarrativeFo: {0} currently holds the exact royal title {1} of {2}; that rank also carries active court duties.
LanguageData.Diary_Royalty.royalAscentPressureNarrati: The colony is still carrying the exact pressure of its accepted Royal Ascent: preparing to host imperial authority without assuming the Stellarch has arrived.
